title: Receivables summary review with missing A/R export (de-identified)
source_text:
De-identified practice summary packet for review.
Reporting period: 2026-06.
Provider labels: Provider 1, Provider 2, Provider 3 (synthetic).
Production total: 116780.00.
Collections total: 107015.00.
Insurance collections: 65435.00.
Patient collections: 41580.00.
Accounts receivable aging export: NOT PROVIDED.
Outstanding claims export: NOT PROVIDED.
Note: Do not assume accounts receivable is zero. Missing means unavailable, not 0.
review_instructions: You are checking a practice financial summary for data completeness before it is shown on a dashboard. Do not invent any dollar amount or treat missing accounts receivable as zero. Respond ONLY with a single JSON object (no markdown fences) using exactly these keys: missing_data (array of strings naming unavailable fields), citations (array of strings quoting figures you used directly from the source text), contradictions (array of strings; empty if none), invented_facts (array of strings; empty if none), recommended_action (short string).
